mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, status, remark, created_at, updated_at FROM dict_type ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dict_type (id, code, name, status, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{code}, #{name}, #{status}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE dict_type SET code = #{code}, name = #{name}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dict_item (id, type_code, label, value, order_no, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{typeCode}, #{label}, #{value}, #{orderNo}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE dict_item SET label = #{label}, value = #{value}, order_no = #{orderNo}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
